about.title: About
about.description:
Send bugs or ideas for improving the functionality to the technical support mail sihtechnic@gmail.com or the appropriate discussion topic in the Steam group.

If the app turned out to be useful, do not forget to rate it in the extension store.

Send commercial offers to csinvhelp@gmail.com.

tradeoffers.title: Trade offers

tradeoffers.nooffers: You have no incoming trade offers at this time
tradeoffers.sponsor: Enter the promocode and win your dream inventory

sda.question_1: What is SDA, and what is it used for?
sda.answer_1: SDA is related to account management on the Steam platform. SDA allows you to generate Steam Guard security codes on your computer, which makes management more convenient. You can also add multiple Steam accounts, view codes, and confirm trades for each account all in one place.
sda.question_2: How do I connect and set up SDA?
sda.answer_2_text: You can find detailed setup instructions
sda.question_3: I don't see my account in SDA.
sda.answer_3: Find the saved .maFile of your account, the name will be the same as your Steam ID then click the “Add Account” button and Import the .maFile back into SDA
sda.answer_4_pt1: You need to go to the Steam account recovery page
sda.answer_4_pt2: and restore access to your account using your Steam security code in the format R99999
sda.question_5: Where can I find information on encryption, codes, and how SDA works?
sda.answer_5_pt1: All the information is available in a detailed
sda.question_6: Google Authorization and Cloud Data Storage
sda.answer_6_pt1: You can find all the information about what SDA cloud storage is and why Google authorization is needed in the tutorial

general.question_1: Why does the item's float sometimes not appear?
general.answer_1: In this case, something may be preventing it from loading. Please check if you have any third-party extensions or VPN/Proxy enabled, and try disabling them. If the problem persists after doing so, feel free to contact our support team at
general.question_2: Why am I getting a 429 error?
general.answer_2_pt1: This is a Steam error that occurs because you’re sending a high volume of requests, usually when trying to load an item’s float.
general.answer_2_pt2: In this case, wait 5–10 minutes, then try again.
general.question_3: Can I export my market history?
general.answer_3: Of course! You just need to open the Export section, select the number of transactions from your history, and confirm by clicking the button. The file will be generated automatically.
general.question_5: Will using SIH get me banned on Steam?
general.answer_5: Using the SIH extension does not violate any points of the Steam User Agreement, so there is no basis for a ban.
general.question_6: Can I view the float value and applied stickers on a Steam item's page?
general.answer_6_pt1: Yes, you just need to load the float manually by pressing the button, or you can enable automatic float loading.
general.answer_6_pt2: All set! Now you can see the wear level, sticker prices, as well as the float value and its visual quality representation.

case_opener.question_1: How do I access the new case-opening simulator with statistics?
case_opener.answer_1: You need to go to the page of any CS2 case, then click on the “Demo Opening” button.
case_opener.question_2: Why do I need a case-opening simulator?
case_opener.answer_2: You can get prices and quantities of cases from all available sources. Now you know the exact chances of obtaining each item from a case, just like in CS2. You can also evaluate the profitability of opening any case and try to get any item you want.

inventory.question_1: How to Use Quick Sell in SIH?
inventory.answer_1_pt1: 1. Go to the Steam Inventory section
inventory.answer_1_pt2: 2. Select the desired items using the “Select Items” button, then click “Go to Sell.”
inventory.answer_1_pt3: 3. Choose the selling method: Manual or Auto.
inventory.answer_1_pt4: 4. If choosing Auto-Sell, enable the checkbox for “price adjustment by marketplace.”
inventory.answer_1_pt5: 5. Click OK, and the items will automatically be listed for sale.
inventory.question_2: How can I quickly relist an item for sale or a buy order?
inventory.answer_2_pt1: Simply select the desired items by clicking on them.
inventory.answer_2_pt2: After that, you will be given three options:
inventory.answer_2_pt6: The selected action will automatically adjust the prices for the items, and you’ll just need to confirm by clicking the “Relisting” button

sihmarket.question_1: How can I buy items at an average of 20-30% cheaper?
sihmarket.answer_1: Simply go to the SIH Market section directly on the Steam market page and select suitable items using the built-in filters.

steam_item_page.question_1: How to Use the SIH Order Book Information?
steam_item_page.answer_1_text: Detailed instructions on working with orders, reading the order book, and trading strategies can be found in this
steam_item_page.question_2: What Features Does SIH Add to Steam Item Pages?
steam_item_page.answer_2_pt1: Let’s explore the free SIH features available for each Steam item page:
steam_item_page.answer_2_pt2: Add items to bookmarks with categorized tags, making it easy to find what you need in the bookmarks section.
steam_item_page.answer_2_pt3: Discover where and how to purchase the item at a 30–40% lower cost than on Steam.
steam_item_page.answer_2_pt4: View a list of external marketplaces, and with a single click, access offers where the item is cheaper than on Steam.
steam_item_page.answer_2_pt5: Adjust commission settings for each marketplace to simplify profit calculation.
steam_item_page.answer_2_pt6: Personalize the order book display and gain access to deeper order data.
steam_item_page.answer_2_pt7: Place buy orders for items with just one click.
steam_item_page.answer_2_pt8: Look up items based on their float value or pattern, and review details such as wear level of applied stickers or their current market price.
steam_item_page.answer_2_pt9: Save time by bulk-loading up to 100 items simultaneously for a more streamlined experience.
steam_item_page.answer_2_pt10: Analyze the profitability of different items through case-opening simulations.
steam_item_page.question_3: What Does SIH.Black Subscription Add to the Features?
steam_item_page.answer_3_pt1: Access instant redirection and updated prices for all other qualities of an item with ease.
steam_item_page.answer_3_pt2: Sort marketplaces by price or create your own sorting criteria to view only the marketplaces relevant to your preferences
steam_item_page.answer_3_pt3: Raise your sell order to the top of the listing with just one click.

developer_options.title: Developer settings
developer_options.description: Attention! Don't touch these settings if you don't understand their meaning!
developer_options.price_update_time_description:
Minimum - 0 ms (prices are not stored in the cache)
Maximum - 3,600,000 (prices are saved up to 60 minutes)

reset_sda_conf_modal.title: Confirmation
reset_sda_conf_modal.text: This action will delete ALL local SDA data from the extension. This means that if you do not have a saved maFile profile and do not know the recovery code, this action may result in the loss of access to your account. Before deletion, we will save the added maFile and manifest file to your device so you can restore them later.

reset_sda_status_modal.error_text:
Failed to delete data.
Please try again or contact SIH technical support.
reset_sda_status_modal.sda_not_connected: Unable to delete data because SDA is not connected
reset_sda_status_modal.success_text: All local SDA data has been deleted

developer_options.user_inventory_parsing_text: The inventory scanner is being tested on a small number of users. And at the moment, you have it turned off. We will probably activate this functionality in one of the next updates.
developer_options.consent_tos: Allow SIH to recommend me games on Steam

settings.note: You need to refresh current pages for changes to take effect

backup.title: Import & Export
backup.header: Backup and Import of SIH Configuration Files
backup.export_text: Export all data, such as configuration settings, favorites, trade history, etc., into a single .json file. You can later import this file onto another device.
backup.import_text: Restore your configuration from a previously saved .json file. Please note that upon import, current settings will be reset and replaced with data from the imported file.

invite_rules.description:
In this section, you can set your own rules for handling incoming Steam friend requests.
Rules are checked in order — the action of the first matching rule will be applied.
This feature works only if you are logged into Steam in the browser you are using.
Ignore friend requests from scammers with SIH.

common_friends_under.name: Common friends same or less than
